---
title: "Page 5 - Discussion Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec07-sp05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Discussion

_Add the core question or prompt that will drive the discussion._

---

## Context

_Provide any necessary background or framing to support the discussion._

---

## Perspectives to consider

_Outline any contrasting viewpoints or starting positions to help stimulate different angles of thought._

---

## How to engage

_Provide guidance on how learners should participate (e.g., "Post your initial response, then reply to two peers")._

---

## Extend your thinking

_Add a follow-up prompt to help learners deepen or extend the discussion after the initial exchange._

---



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this interpretation task (e.g. 'Look closely at the figure below')._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.interpretation}
**Critical Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prompt the learner to interpret a specific figure, table, or output._]

**What to consider:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance or key things that should have been noticed._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this open reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="open"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 4 - Application Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 6 - Interactive Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
